description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:stretch-slim Docker image. Add a pages job (default stage) that runs only on the master branch, executes the shell commands: apt-get update, apt-get -y install python3-sphinx, apt-get -y install make texlive-full latexmk, make html, and mv _build/html/ public/. Publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
